1881970.name: World of Warplanes - I-5 SHKAS Pack
1881970.description:
This DLC is not compatible with an account created outside Steam.
This DLC will be available until February 16, 2023.

This bundle includes the Soviet Polikarpov I-5 ShKAS multirole fighter. This aircarft boasts excellent speed and maneuverability, which makes it a real gamechanger at low-altitudes! In addition, you will receive days of Premium account, and a stock of supply crates in which you can find days of Premium Account, Premium aircraft, gold, Free XP, experimental equipment, and much more. You will also get a thematic emblem that gives a bonus (crew experience in each battle: +2%)!

DLC Content:
  • Polikarpov I-5 ShKAS, a Soviet Tier II multirole fighter
  • 1 Hangar slot
  • 1 crew trained to 100%
  • 1 emblem
  • 3 days of Premium Account
  • 1 Supply crate
  • 2 Steel Supply Crates
1881970.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 法语*, 德语*, 波兰语*, 捷克语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
